sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94610" key="skafei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκᾰφ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n94610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">digging, hoeing</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
